title: YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT - 211info
text: LIFEWORKS NW KING YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient services for drug and alcohol use disorders for youth and their families, including integrated mental health care. Services are available in the community, including schools. Also provides a bilingual, culturally specific outpatient program for Latino youth and their families. 3716 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Ages 12-18 (19 if still in high school) and their families Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 645-9010 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 645-9010 Intake (888) 645-1666 Toll-free Main phone (503) 282-3296 ext 6281 For follow-up calls Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake FEES: Varies by program. Nearly all LifeWorks Northwest programs accept OHP/Medicaid and Medicare. Some programs serve uninsured individuals on sliding scale. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-8pm, Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet Bus 6 Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Adolescents Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - INTENSIVE COMMUNITY-BASED SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT EDUCATION AND SUPPORT MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - SEVERE MENTAL ILLNESS SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TRANSITION-AGE YOUTH SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADULT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFEWORKS NW KING
